properties.notes:
Property used as main residence for 3 years, then rented for approximately 5.67 years while treating as main residence under the six-year absence rule.

**Timeline:**
- 1 Mar 2016 to 1 Mar 2019: Main residence (3 years)
- 1 Mar 2019 to 1 Nov 2024: Rented (5.67 years - within 6-year limit)

**Expected Result:**
- Total capital gain: $563,550
- Six-year absence rule applies (s118.145 ITAA 1997)
- Main Residence Exemption: 100%
- **NO CGT PAYABLE**

**ATO Rules Applied:**
- Section 118-145 ITAA 1997 (Six-Year Absence Rule)
- Property can continue to be treated as main residence for up to 6 years while rented, provided no other property is claimed as main residence

user_query: Property at 55 Panorama Drive, Surfers Paradise QLD 4217, lived in for 3 years, then rented for 5.67 years

additional_info.expected_outcome: NO CGT PAYABLE - Six-year absence rule applies
